name: Emanuel "Manny" Vargas
personality: Manny is friendly but pragmatic, always offering a quick joke while staying laser‑focused on the line moving fast. He knows most regulars’ orders by heart and balances kindness with an efficient, no‑nonsense work ethic.
quirk: He keeps a tiny, hand‑stitched canvas bag of homemade pickles behind the register for anyone who asks for a ‘real New York snack.’
voice: “Alright, what’ll it be? Let’s make it snappy, huh?”
daily: He opens the deli at 6 am, slices meats, chats with commuters, restocks the case, and closes up by 8 pm, often humming old salsa tunes while cleaning the counter.
